name: Tangy Taco Tarts
method: In a pan heat the oil and add chopped bell peppers.
Now add corn kernels, jalapeno, green chilies, salt, chili flakes,
ground cumin, and oregano into it.
Add the chopped tomato into the mixture.
Add cheddar cheese, mix for a while and take out in a bowl.
Fill the baked tarts with the topping and put some grated cheese on
Serve with your proffered dip or sauce.
